song.title: Springs of Living Water
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G D7 I thirsted in the barren land of Babylon . G And nothing satisfying there I found; . D7 But to the blessed local church one day I came, . G C G Where springs of living water do abound.
[C] .D7 G Drinking at the springs of living water, .D7 Happy now am I, . G C G My heart they satisfy; .D7 G Drinking at the springs of living water, . C D7 G-C-G O wonderful and bountiful supply!
[V2] How sweet the living water from the hills of God, It’s flowing in and flowing out of me; O now I’ve found the peace for which I long had sought, Where there is life and life abundantly.
[V3] O brother, won’t you gather in the local church? A fountain here is flowing deep and wide. The Shepherd now would bring you to the local church, Where thirsty spirits can be satisfied.
